summary_en: ¥10.0B upper limit; 4,200,000 shares (0.92% of shares outstanding); ToSTNeT-3 and open-market purchase; execution window May 18–Dec 30, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Hachijuni Nagano Bank announced on 15 May 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire up to 4.2 million treasury shares (0.92% of outstanding shares) for a maximum of ¥10.0 billion during the period from 18 May through 30 December 2026. The acquisition will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 off-market trades and open-market purchases. The stated purpose is to support capital-allocation strategy in response to changing business conditions and to return value to shareholders. As of 31 March 2026, the bank held 39.2 million treasury shares against 454.5 million shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The specific execution timing and detailed methods will be announced separately.
